subject: A large badger-like creature with a saddle harness crouches near a burrow, a smaller one visible beside it, surrounded by oversized cacti
description: The primary subject is a large, powerful badger-like creature — broad-shouldered with a distinctive striped facial pattern, heavy claws, and bared teeth suggesting aggression or threat display. It wears a leather saddle harness across its back. A second, smaller creature of the same species is visible just to the right and slightly behind the primary one. The setting is a dry desert terrain with enormous yellowish-green cactus forms in the background. A large grub-like pale worm protrudes from one of the cacti. The overall palette is earthy — sandy tan, dark brown, and muted greens.
foreground: Large badger-like creature with saddle harness crouched low, baring teeth; smaller companion beside it
background: Sandy desert ground, oversized cactus forms, pale grub emerging from cactus
emotion: Aggressive stubbornness — the creature is low to the ground, teeth bared, not giving ground
